creator: k5@cheerful.com
text:
fixing "X manpage" error with XFree86-4 on bento.
	MAINTAINER does not have FreeBSD machine anymore, so pass this port
	to ports@FreeBSD.org.

Fix: pre-install -> build-install to make reinstall target working.
How-To-Repeat: 	w3m -dump http://bento.freebsd.org/errorlogs/errorlogs/e.4.20001204/ \|
	grep 'X manpage'
